creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sun Jul 14 18:15:44 2013
New Revision: 322995
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322995

Log:
  devel/libarena: update to 0.3.6
  
  - Update to 0.3.6 [1]
  - Convert new USES gmake
  - Remove MARK_JOBS_SAFE, which is now default
  
  Changes: http://25thandclement.com/~william/projects/libarena.html#news
  
  PR:		ports/180457 [1]
  Submitted by:	Rodrigo (ros) OSORIO <rodrigo bebik.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/libarena/Makefile
  head/devel/libarena/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/libarena/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libarena/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 18:07:37 2013	(r322994)
+++ head/devel/libarena/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 18:15:44 2013	(r322995)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libarena
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.6
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.25thandclement.com/~william/projects/releases/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
@@ -12,8 +12,7 @@ COMMENT=	Custom Memory Allocator Interfa
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+USES=		gmake
 
 PLIST_FILES=	include/arena/align.h \
 		include/arena/arena.h \

Modified: head/devel/libarena/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libarena/distinfo	Sun Jul 14 18:07:37 2013	(r322994)
+++ head/devel/libarena/distinfo	Sun Jul 14 18:15:44 2013	(r322995)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libarena-0.3.5.tgz) = f04a4b5fe7894b11107c889f0f55707a6a8b8d27836e2ea42692e529bd35e78f
-SIZE (libarena-0.3.5.tgz) = 22009
+SHA256 (libarena-0.3.6.tgz) = 8d0b31c33a0b687a1347523b39c723248818eca226227c818d0090feb2bfb832
+SIZE (libarena-0.3.6.tgz) = 22182
